title: The process harness — the canonical pipeline as a mechanical deny surface with a state layer, an ask gate, and user-owned authorization objects
description:
Foreclose LLM laziness and chaos-producing relitigation mechanistically: the canonical process stops being policy the model recalls and becomes refusals the harness issues.
The canonical valid process is the per-task state machine SURFACED → INVESTIGATED → FILED → GATE-VALIDATED → EXPLORED → PLANNED → BASELINED → IMPLEMENTED → GATED → DEMOED → PROBED → findings-loop → DOCS-SYNCED → MERGED → CLOSED → HELD-RELEASE (analysis/2026-07-06-harness-requirements.md §1).
Five pillars (mechanism model per analysis/2026-07-06-harness-exemplars-wasc-synth.md):
1. Procedure-as-refusal (R1–R5) — PreToolUse deny hooks close the honor-system chokepoints: direct substrate-JSON writes, --no-verify / destructive git, exit-code masking, off-plan or integration-branch source edits, orchestrator edits during delegated implementation.
2. State layer (R11, R13–R16, R18–R19) — per-work-unit phase state (SessionStart-seeded from substrate truth, event-minted transitions) lets hooks ask "is this call legal in this state"; a findings ledger makes iterate-to-zero mechanical.
3. Stop-hook ask gate (R12) — blocks turn-end on any ask failing the three-legitimate-stops filter; every other ask is relitigation, refused with the rule named.
4. Authorization as object (R2, R4, R6) — the release/push hold becomes a deny-without-user-minted-grant hook; same-turn self-attestation closed by a guard-marker the Stop hook clears.
5. Harness predictability (R3, R7–R9, R17, R20) — wiring moves to tracked .claude/settings.json; mandates.jsonl populated; every guard traces its failure class; the deny surface gets regression cells.
Dispatch prompts for subagents inline the mandates deterministically (WASC renderer pattern) since subagents do not receive the UserPromptSubmit injection.
Reasoned omissions from the WASC exemplar: one-bash-per-turn (no observed failure of that class in this project's record; parallel independent calls are the operating style) and git-tracked rendered prompts (claude-history is this project's forensic layer for dispatch reconstruction).
motivation: User directive (2026-07-06, verbatim): "i cannot rely on claude code deciding to honor and follow requisite policies and conventions on their own, because clearly that is not happening, and chaos producing relitigation is now become more routine. we need to foreclose it mechanistically. you are deviating and the likelihood of further chaos production is a danger to the rational sound valid continuance of work in this project. our first model of harness was the wasc project. we also have a variant example in ../MUSE/SYNTH. I want the predictable non-bypassable harness shaped for this project that encodes the canonical valid process for success such that llm laziness and chaos production ends for good." The observed record: two same-day relitigation corrections (governed timing and iterate-to-zero findings reframed as asks at turn boundaries), and the requirements investigation's finding that everything between user prompt and commit — investigation discipline, plan mode, subagent-primary implementation, runtime demo, adversarial probe, iterate-to-zero, docs audit, ask-vs-proceed, release hold — is honor-system, with the hook wiring itself untracked.
acceptance_criteria: Deny surface live (R1–R5). Four PreToolUse guards block, each with regression cells (specifics per TASK-094/095/097): (a) substrate-JSON direct writes; (b) --no-verify + destructive git without sentinel; (c) pipe/truncate-masked gate commands; (d) off-plan or integration-branch packages/** edits.

The same-turn sentinel hole is closed (R6): a guard-fired marker set on any provenance-guard block is cleared only by the Stop hook at a genuine turn boundary, and a sentinel-bearing re-issue before the marker clears is blocked.

Filing completeness is checked at the guard (R7-R8): a framework-gaps append without an investigation-report citation in its evidence is blocked; deferral/scope-reduction lexical markers in filings and plan text draw a non-blocking nudge naming the governing mandate.

The per-prompt governance layer is populated (R9): .claude/mandates.jsonl carries the project-shaped mandates (pipeline-first, explore-agents-only, three-stops ask gate, iterate-to-zero) through the existing UserPromptSubmit injection slot, and subagent dispatch prompts inline them deterministically.

The phase-state layer exists (R11): a machine-readable per-work-unit pipeline state seeded/reconciled at SessionStart from substrate truth (never from narrative), transitions minted by hook-verified events (ExitPlanMode → PLANNED, feature-branch commit → IMPLEMENTED, complete-task → CLOSED), consulted by the deny hooks.

The Stop-hook ask gate is live (R12): a turn ending on an ask that fails the three-legitimate-stops filter (a pending provenance grant, an escalation naming why the choice is underdetermined, a HELD action awaiting authorization) is blocked with the governing convention/mandate named; the three legitimate stops always pass.

Iterate-to-zero is mechanical (R13-R14): probe/demo findings land in a findings ledger; git merge into the integration branch and complete-task are blocked while the ledger holds open entries; closure requires recorded demo evidence and a fresh-context probe verdict; the user's recorded deprioritization is the only other closing path.

Implementation discipline is enforced (R15-R16, R10): orchestrator source edits while the phase state says implementation is delegated are blocked (user-sentinel escape per mandate-005's explicit-direction carve-out); orchestrator investigation-reads outside the claim-verification window draw a nudge; a PostToolUse(Agent) hook injects the subagent-claim verification checklist.

HELD actions are mechanically held (R4): npm run release:*, npm publish, and non-durably-authorized git push are blocked without a user-minted grant object; the grant is user-attributed and expires with its scope.

The harness itself is predictable (R17-R20): hook registrations live in tracked .claude/settings.json; a session driver walks a work unit through the state machine as the path of least resistance; the milestone-validity-gate check fires at plan approval for milestone-member tasks once its record type exists; every guard's refusal text names the rule and the failure class it forecloses; the deny surface carries its own regression cells (true-positives still block, legitimate work passes).
The three legitimate stops are preserved everywhere: no mechanism auto-grants a provenance ceremony, auto-decides an honestly-underdetermined scope/value judgment, or auto-proceeds a HELD action.
